items.title: Cross-brand Recognition discovery
items.name: Cross-brand Recognition discovery
items.summary: Planned discovery on how aggressively the portfolio should connect identity and premium journeys across brands.
items.opportunity: Clarify where cross-brand audience activation creates value versus where it feels intrusive or editorially mismatched.

linkedInitiatives.description: Planned initiative to improve cross-brand identity matching, premium cross-sell, and partner-led activation.

riskFocus.question: How much cross-brand activation increases value without harming trust?
riskFocus.hypothesis: Readers accept more cross-brand activation when value exchange is explicit and brand fit is strong.

plannedActivities: Compare partner activation by portfolio bundle packaging.
items.decisionToMake: Decide the acceptable level of cross-brand activation for Q3.
